sections.header: 8. Contact Information and Important College Links
sections.text:
MSAJCE institution contact details, and important portal links for students related to admissions, exams, fee payment, and student resources. MSAJCE is located at 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103. The phone number is +91 99400 04500. The email address is msajce.office@gmail.com. The grievance email address is grievance@msajce-edu.in. The website is www.msajce-edu.in. The Library Page URL is <https://www.msajce-edu.in/library.php>. Students can access the online application form at <https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE>, pay fees online at <https://www.feepayr.com/>, and visit the students corner at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/studentscorner.php>. A college video is available at <https://youtu.be/aNVaQWh1Pp4>. The Anna University Approval can be found at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/AnnaUnivApproval.pdf>, and the AICTE Approval is at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/AICTE-APPROVAL.pdf>. The Mandatory Disclosure is located at <http://msajce-edu.in/uploads/MandatoryDisclosure.pdf>. The Grievance Cell can be accessed at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/grievanceredressalcommittee.php>, NAAC at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/naac.php>, and IQAC at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/iqac.php>. NIRF is available at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/nirf.php>, the Academic Calendar at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/AC.php>, and the College Management System at <https://cims.mastersofterp.in/>. Exam Registration for I & II Year is at <https://tinyurl.com/I-AND-II-YEAR-REGISTRATION>, and for III & IV Year at <https://tinyurl.com/III-AND-IV-YEAR-REGISTRATION>. ESE Results can be found at <https://results.msajce-edu.in/>. The AICTE Scholarship is at <https://www.aicte.gov.in/schemes/students-development-schemes>, and the Annual Report AY2023-2024 at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/uploads/aqar/AnnualReport2023-2024.pdf>. Information about the Hostel is at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/hostel.php>, Transport at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/transport.php>, and Placement at <https://www.msajce-edu.in/placement.php>.

The following data is from the MSAJCE — Learning Centre (Library) Contact table: The Chief Librarian is Mr. S. Sudhakar and the Librarian is Mr. John Anish. The Library I/C is Dr. Kamalaselvan A and the Library I/C (AP/ECE) is Mrs. Anusuya P. The address is 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103. The phone number is +91 99400 04500, the email address is msajce.office@gmail.com, and the website is www.msajce-edu.in.

The following data is from the unnamed table: MSAJCE is located at 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103, with the phone number +91 99400 04500, email msajce.office@gmail.com, and website www.msajce-edu.in.
